paper.title: Fly navigational responses to odor motion and gradient cues are tuned to plume statistics

map_window.note: The preprint-era whole_movie_processing.py hard-coded this window for both plume types. Gradient statistics use every frame; motion uses frames with both temporal neighbors.

snapshot_frames.note: The notebook calls each snapshot routine at the plume frame and computes cue panels from that frame plus the next two.

intensity_profiles.note: The DANDI scratch frames are already calibrated to a legacy-like 0-255 range; do not apply the AVI multiplier twice.

smooth.conversion_note: The committed conversion notebook and the configured published AVI differ by filename; both legacy endpoint alignment and corrected timestamp profiles are implemented.

complex_maps.citation: Brudner, Samuel (2026) Data for fly navigational responses exploiting plume-specific odor motion and gradient cues (Version 0.260630.1657) [Data set]. DANDI Archive. https://doi.org/10.48324/dandi.001871/0.260630.1657

figure1.known_input_gap: The public DANDI Figure S1 complex window contains raw frames 300-1799 and can reproduce the temporal maps, but not the published Figure 1 complex snapshot at full-video frame 2900. The full background-subtracted sequence was not found in the inspected Dryad/DANDI deposits as of 2026-07-13.

figure2.legacy_sum_note: The executable source used 0.5*mean(R+L), while the manuscript formula displays mean(L+R). Training standardization makes the fitted standardized weights and AUC invariant to this positive scaling.
figure2.legacy_sanitation: np.nan_to_num was applied before the log-threshold transform.
figure2.legacy_feature_sign_note: The executable source used R-L and R(t)L(t+d)-R(t+d)L(t), opposite the displayed manuscript formulas if L/R are read literally.
figure2.hardcoded_error_note: The plotted complex error bars differ from standard deviations printed from loaded arrays; the summary table preserves the plotted hardcodes.

figure3.dense_schematic_note: The published conceptual schematic shows one scalar before sigmoid; the archived checkpoint implementation has two output logits whose difference defines that scalar.

validation_artifact.note: Unverifiable local diagnostic: the checkpoint was located locally but is not committed, and the evaluation arrays/hashes are not available in this repository.

probe.randomness_note: The notebook did not seed its Monte Carlo motion probes; this implementation defaults to seed 0 and records it.

training_discrepancies: MNM training hyperparameters described in Methods differ from the archived model configuration.
The smooth DNM notebook learning rate differs from the Methods description.
The smooth DNM notebook annotates AUC 0.734; the paper and local diagnostic round to 0.735.
figure3.known_input_gap: The MNM R1/R2 checkpoints and center-shifted complex DNM R1 checkpoint used for Figure 3 were not found in source commit 659d0c3 or the Dryad/DANDI deposits inspected as of 2026-07-13. An exact smooth DNM R1 checkpoint was located locally for diagnostic validation but is not checked into this repository. Exact data-derived panels require the missing files.
